snippet.title: New Community Event: Unleash the Duke
snippet.description:
Dragon Duke needs to be freed, and he’s counting on all of you.

Starting tomorrow, jump into the Unleash the Duke Community Event, available in-game.

Navigate the dungeon, complete objectives, and choose one of the three new doors every day - each hiding different rewards. Push all the way to the final door, and everyone will unlock the Dragon Statue.

Free the Duke!
_______

Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans

PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan

- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Starring the sensational Gurnam Bhullar alongside the stunning Isha Malviya, this Punjabi cinema is crafted for every soul that has ever loved deeply. Directed by the talented Manvir Brar, Ishqa'n De Lekhe is set to redefine Punjabi romance on the big screen.
After delivering back-to-back blockbusters with Lekh and Surkhi Bhindi, Gurnam Bhullar returns with yet another masterpiece — and this one is nothing short of magical. snippet.title: Weltify Pro Clash Season 2 | Semi Finals Day 1 | #godlike #gdr #rntx #orangutan  #8bit #getweltified
snippet.description:
Welcome to WELTIFY PRO CLASH SEASON 2 (WPCS2) — one of India’s biggest competitive BGMI esports tournaments.

🏆 STAGE: Semi Finals – Day 1
📅 DATE: 23rd February 2026
⏰ TIME: 5:00 PM onwards
📍 FORMAT: Online

MATCH MAP ORDER
🔹 A x B Erangel
🔹A x B Miramar
🔹A x C Erangel
🔹A x C Miramar
🔹B x C Erangel
🔹B x C Miramar

GROUP A
Hero Xtreme GodLike, Victores Sumus, NoNx Esports, Vasista Esports, Welt Esports, White Walkers, Team Alpha, Riotnationz
GROUP B
iQOO Revenant X Spark, iQOO 8Bit, Genesis Esports, Team LEFP, Vanguard Esports, LHS Esports, EMZ Esports, Myth Esports
GROUP C
iQOO Orangutan, OnePlus Gods Reign, Meta Ninza, 4TR Official, Rising Esports, Team H4K, AutoBotz Esports, Gods 4 Reason

Welt Esports is a competitive gaming organization dedicated to excellence, innovation, and community within the global esports scene. Founded with a passion for gaming and a commitment to growth, Welt Esports brings together top-tier talent, strategic minds, and a shared vision to dominate the digital battlefield.

Specializing in titles such as Bgmi,Clash Royale,Free Fire,Valorant and Fortnite, our teams are known for their tactical precision, relentless grind, and dynamic playstyles. We focus not only on winning, but on creating a culture where players can thrive—both in and out of the game.

Welt Esports is more than just a team; it's a movement. Our organization is built on the belief that esports is a legitimate and powerful force in entertainment, capable of inspiring, connecting, and pushing boundaries. We support our players with elite coaching, mental performance resources, and cutting-edge training environments.

Whether we’re lighting up the main stage or growing our fanbase online, Welt Esports stands for passion, perseverance, and performance. As we continue to rise, we invite gamers, fans, and partners to be a part of our journey—to create, compete, and conquer together under one banner: Welt.

#Thrist For Gamers!

snippet.title: Toxic Movie Teaser Review In Kannada by Amar Prasad | Rocking Star Yash | Masth Magaa
snippet.description:
The highly anticipated teaser for Rocking Star Yash's upcoming magnum opus, "Toxic," directed by Geetu Mohandas, is finally out and making massive waves across the internet! In this exclusive video, Amar Prasad breaks down the complete teaser frame-by-frame to uncover the ultimate secrets behind the visuals.
